privileged_info_summary: The task is to create a FreeCAD 3D model of a connecting rod with an I-beam profile. Data is synthetic (agent creates from scratch). All metadata specifications are verified against the task description: connecting rod has a 100mm center-to-center distance between two cylindrical ends with outer diameters of 40mm (big end) and 20mm (small end), inner hole diameters of 30mm and 12mm respectively, overall dimensions approximately 120mm length x 40mm width x 10mm thickness, and an I-beam pocket creating a central web 6mm thick. The file is saved as connecting_rod.FCStd to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/.
